examples: It might be wrong to expect that our world would be saved at one stroke with some miraculous technology.
She had a miraculous quality of touch, a seemingly autonomous left hand; no artist in her generation could clarify with such deftness the polyphonic writing of the Baroque masters.
The result was a superb education system and a road network that seemed almost miraculous.
Does President Hollande's victory make it more likely that this miraculous deal might be struck?
